name: metafolder
description: npm workspace root. The project is a Rust workspace; this exists only so the GUI frontend's node_modules hoists here, which lets vitest be rooted at crates/gui and therefore see the panel JS (panel-shim/ and default-config/panel-types/) that lives above the vite root. Without it, coverage silently reports on the Svelte shell alone — a third of the GUI — and reads as if it covered everything.
